title: Alex Golesh Head Football Coach Employment Contract

communications.subject: Alabama Open Records Law Request: Alex Golesh Head Football Coach Employment Contract
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Alabama Open Records Law, I hereby request the following records:

The complete, executed employment agreement, contract, and/or memorandum of understanding between Auburn University (and/or the Auburn University Board of Trustees) and Alex Golesh relating to his employment as head football coach, which was entered into on or about November 30, 2025.
Any and all amendments, addenda, side letters, term sheets, or supplemental agreements to that contract executed to date.

Any schedules, exhibits, or attachments referenced in or incorporated into the contract, including (but not limited to) those describing base salary, supplemental/outside marketing and promotional income, retention payments, performance bonuses, buyout/liquidated damages provisions, and benefits or perquisites.

I am requesting the complete, executed document(s), including all signature pages. If any portion is considered exempt from disclosure, please redact only that portion and release the remainder, along with a citation to the specific legal authority for each redaction.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

André Natta, a citizen of Alabama, in coordination with Truman Burrage.
